name: ComputeRequest validation rejects empty raw_expression
description: Functional test: validate Pydantic model ComputeRequest and its field_validator validate_expression to ensure an empty or whitespace-only raw_expression raises ValidationError.
input: Attempt to construct ComputeRequest(request_id='req-1', raw_expression='   ', precision=None, show_steps=False)
output: Pydantic ValidationError raised during ComputeRequest construction (field raw_expression invalid).
success_criteria: Validation error message mentions 'raw_expression is empty' or equivalent
request_id validator (validate_request_id) trims and enforces presence when tested separately
